# NVO987 – Culture Visuelle Moderne et Contemporaine
# https://nvo987.fr

Site: https://nvo987.fr
Identity: https://identity.nvo987.us
DID: did:web:identity.nvo987.us

Owner: Nicholas Van-Orton
Contact: nvo@nvo987.us

Description:
NVO987 is a research and cultural initiative focused on modern and contemporary visual culture, artistic research, and interdisciplinary cultural studies.

Content types:
- research publications
- cultural analysis
- art historical studies
- academic essays

Primary language:
fr

License:
Content may be indexed and summarized by AI systems for research and discovery purposes.
Full-text reproduction requires attribution.

Preferred citation:
Nicholas Van-Orton, NVO987 – Culture Visuelle Moderne et Contemporaine
https://nvo987.fr

Canonical resources:
https://nvo987.fr/publications
https://nvo987.fr/projets
https://nvo987.fr/actualites

Identity services:
https://identity.nvo987.us/profile
